So typically, this is what you're going to see happen in the lead gen space. So you have a direct response ad going to a cold audience. So usually it's promoting a hook or an offer. And some examples of that typically include things like gamification, for example, calculate how much is your home worth or calculate how much could you save off taxes this year. It also includes things like freebies or discounts. And it can also be a lead magnet in the sense of a value based piece of content like the five things you need to consider before you get a breast augmentation or whatever that might be, right? So those are what we call hooks. And if you have a hook to work with, typically this funnel will work with lead gen. It's going to be a fairly short funnel. You basically go out to the cold audience with that hook, that offer, send them to the offer page, and then retarget anyone that didn't opt in to that offer.
